productDisplayName: Nike Men Asem Cricket Crazy Blue T-Shirts
description: CompositionBlue round neck cotton t-shirt, with short sleeves, graphic print on the chest, branding on left sleeve and slogan on back neckWash careMachine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergentDo not bleachAvoid soaking/remove promptlyLine dry inside out in shadeWarm iron onlyDo not iron directly on print/embroideryFitComfortFlaunt your craze for cricket and pride in the Indian cricket team's historic victory during the ICC 2011 World Cup with this nike t-shirt. The cartoon of a crcket-crazy individual is the best way to flaunt your support to the Indian cricket team and lift its morale even after the poor performance during the UK tour. Team this t-shirt with smart casuals and wear it to all sporting arenas and casual outings.
